subscription_type.description: The subscription type of the user. Can be one of PERSON_SUPER_LIGHT_V1, PERSON_LIGHT_V1, PERSON_MORE_V1, PERSON_FREE_V1, PERSON_PREMIUM_V1, COMPANY_V1, or COMPANY_V2.

id.description: The id of the billing contract.

created.description: The timestamp when the billing contract was made.

updated.description: The timestamp when the billing contract was last updated.

contract_date_start.description: The date from when the billing contract is valid.

contract_date_end.description: The date until when the billing contract is valid.

contract_version.description: The version of the billing contract.

subscription_type_downgrade.description: The subscription type the user will have after a subscription downgrade. Will be null if downgrading is not possible.
